abstract.description:
Simulated dataset DYToMuMu_M-200To400_TuneCP5_13TeV-powheg-pythia8 in NANOAODSIM format for 2016 collision data.

See the description of the simulated dataset names in: About CMS simulated dataset names.

These simulated datasets correspond to the collision data collected by the CMS experiment in 2016.

methodology.description: These data were generated in several steps (see also CMS Monte Carlo production overview):

configuration_files.script:
#!/bin/bash

# GEN Script begin
rm -f request_fragment_check.py
wget -q https://raw.githubusercontent.com/cms-sw/genproductions/master/bin/utils/request_fragment_check.py
chmod +x request_fragment_check.py
./request_fragment_check.py --bypass_status --prepid EXO-RunIISummer20UL16wmLHEGEN-01134
GEN_ERR=$?
if [ $GEN_ERR -ne 0 ]; then
  echo "GEN Checking Script returned exit code $GEN_ERR which means there are $GEN_ERR errors"
  echo "Validation WILL NOT RUN"
  echo "Please correct errors in the request and run validation again"
  exit $GEN_ERR
fi
echo "Running VALIDATION. GEN Request Checking Script returned no errors"
# GEN Script end

# Download fragment from McM
curl -s -k https://cms-pdmv-prod.web.cern.ch/mcm/public/restapi/requests/get_fragment/EXO-RunIISummer20UL16wmLHEGEN-01134 --retry 3 --create-dirs -o Configuration/GenProduction/python/EXO-RunIISummer20UL16wmLHEGEN-01134-fragment.py
[ -s Configuration/GenProduction/python/EXO-RunIISummer20UL16wmLHEGEN-01134-fragment.py ] || exit $?;

# Check if fragment contais gridpack path ant that it is in cvmfs
if grep -q "gridpacks" Configuration/GenProduction/python/EXO-RunIISummer20UL16wmLHEGEN-01134-fragment.py; then
  if ! grep -q "/cvmfs/cms.cern.ch/phys_generator/gridpacks" Configuration/GenProduction/python/EXO-RunIISummer20UL16wmLHEGEN-01134-fragment.py; then
    echo "Gridpack inside fragment is not in cvmfs."
    exit -1
  fi
fi

# Dump actual test code to a EXO-RunIISummer20UL16wmLHEGEN-01134_test.sh file that can be run in Singularity
cat <<'EndOfTestFile' > EXO-RunIISummer20UL16wmLHEGEN-01134_test.sh
#!/bin/bash

export SCRAM_ARCH=slc7_amd64_gcc700

source /cvmfs/cms.cern.ch/cmsset_default.sh
if [ -r CMSSW_10_6_30_patch1/src ] ; then
  echo release CMSSW_10_6_30_patch1 already exists
else
  scram p CMSSW CMSSW_10_6_30_patch1
fi
cd CMSSW_10_6_30_patch1/src
eval `scram runtime -sh`

mv ../../Configuration .
scram b
cd ../..

# Maximum validation duration: 28800s
# Margin for validation duration: 30%
# Validation duration with margin: 28800 * (1 - 0.30) = 20160s
# Time per event for each sequence: 1.8490s
# Threads for each sequence: 1
# Time per event for single thread for each sequence: 1 * 1.8490s = 1.8490s
# Which adds up to 1.8490s per event
# Single core events that fit in validation duration: 20160s / 1.8490s = 10903
# Produced events limit in McM is 10000
# According to 1.0000 efficiency, validation should run 10000 / 1.0000 = 10000 events to reach the limit of 10000
# Take the minimum of 10903 and 10000, but more than 0 -> 10000
# It is estimated that this validation will produce: 10000 * 1.0000 = 10000 events
EVENTS=10000


# cmsDriver command
cmsDriver.py Configuration/GenProduction/python/EXO-RunIISummer20UL16wmLHEGEN-01134-fragment.py --python_filename EXO-RunIISummer20UL16wmLHEGEN-01134_1_cfg.py --eventcontent RAWSIM,LHE --customise Configuration/DataProcessing/Utils.addMonitoring --datatier GEN,LHE --fileout file:EXO-RunIISummer20UL16wmLHEGEN-01134.root --conditions 106X_mcRun2_asymptotic_v13 --beamspot Realistic25ns13TeV2016Collision --customise_commands process.source.numberEventsInLuminosityBlock="cms.untracked.uint32(100)" --step LHE,GEN --geometry DB:Extended --era Run2_2016 --no_exec --mc -n $EVENTS || exit $? ;

# Run generated config
REPORT_NAME=EXO-RunIISummer20UL16wmLHEGEN-01134_report.xml
# Run the cmsRun
cmsRun -e -j $REPORT_NAME EXO-RunIISummer20UL16wmLHEGEN-01134_1_cfg.py || exit $? ;

# Parse values from EXO-RunIISummer20UL16wmLHEGEN-01134_report.xml report
processedEvents=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"NumberEvents\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
producedEvents=$(grep -Po "(?<=<TotalEvents>)(\d*)(?=</TotalEvents>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
threads=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"NumberOfThreads\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
peakValueRss=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"PeakValueRss\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
peakValueVsize=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"PeakValueVsize\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
totalSize=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"Timing-tstoragefile-write-totalMegabytes\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
totalSizeAlt=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"Timing-file-write-totalMegabytes\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
totalJobTime=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"TotalJobTime\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
totalJobCPU=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"TotalJobCPU\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
eventThroughput=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"EventThroughput\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
avgEventTime=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"AvgEventTime\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
if [ -z "$threads" ]; then
  echo "Could not find NumberOfThreads in report, defaulting to 1"
  threads=1
fi
if [ -z "$eventThroughput" ]; then
  eventThroughput=$(bc -l <<< "scale=4; 1 / ($avgEventTime / $threads)")
fi
if [ -z "$totalSize" ]; then
  totalSize=$totalSizeAlt
fi
if [ -z "$processedEvents" ]; then
  processedEvents=$EVENTS
fi
echo "Validation report of EXO-RunIISummer20UL16wmLHEGEN-01134 sequence 1/1"
echo "Processed events: $processedEvents"
echo "Produced events: $producedEvents"
echo "Threads: $threads"
echo "Peak value RSS: $peakValueRss MB"
echo "Peak value Vsize: $peakValueVsize MB"
echo "Total size: $totalSize MB"
echo "Total job time: $totalJobTime s"
echo "Total CPU time: $totalJobCPU s"
echo "Event throughput: $eventThroughput"
echo "CPU efficiency: "$(bc -l <<< "scale=2; ($totalJobCPU * 100) / ($threads * $totalJobTime)")" %"
echo "Size per event: "$(bc -l <<< "scale=4; ($totalSize * 1024 / $producedEvents)")" kB"
echo "Time per event: "$(bc -l <<< "scale=4; (1 / $eventThroughput)")" s"
echo "Filter efficiency percent: "$(bc -l <<< "scale=8; ($producedEvents * 100) / $processedEvents")" %"
echo "Filter efficiency fraction: "$(bc -l <<< "scale=10; ($producedEvents) / $processedEvents")

# End of EXO-RunIISummer20UL16wmLHEGEN-01134_test.sh file
EndOfTestFile

# Make file executable
chmod +x EXO-RunIISummer20UL16wmLHEGEN-01134_test.sh

if [ -e "/cvmfs/unpacked.cern.ch/registry.hub.docker.com/cmssw/el7:amd64" ]; then
  CONTAINER_NAME="el7:amd64"
elif [ -e "/cvmfs/unpacked.cern.ch/registry.hub.docker.com/cmssw/el7:x86_64" ]; then
  CONTAINER_NAME="el7:x86_64"
else
  echo "Could not find amd64 or x86_64 for el7"
  exit 1
fi
# Run in singularity container
# Mount afs, eos, cvmfs
# Mount /etc/grid-security for xrootd
export SINGULARITY_CACHEDIR="/tmp/$(whoami)/singularity"
singularity run -B /afs -B /eos -B /cvmfs -B /etc/grid-security -B /etc/pki/ca-trust --home $PWD:$PWD /cvmfs/unpacked.cern.ch/registry.hub.docker.com/cmssw/$CONTAINER_NAME $(echo $(pwd)/EXO-RunIISummer20UL16wmLHEGEN-01134_test.sh)
configuration_files.title: Production script

configuration_files.script:
import FWCore.ParameterSet.Config as cms

externalLHEProducer = cms.EDProducer("ExternalLHEProducer",
    args = cms.vstring('/cvmfs/cms.cern.ch/phys_generator/gridpacks/UL/13TeV/powheg/V2/DYToLL_NNPDF31_13TeV_MllBinned/Z_slc7_amd64_gcc700_CMSSW_10_6_20_my_ZMuMu_M-200To400.tgz'),
    nEvents = cms.untracked.uint32(5000),
    numberOfParameters = cms.uint32(1),
    outputFile = cms.string('cmsgrid_final.lhe'),
    generateConcurrently = cms.untracked.bool(True),
    scriptName = cms.FileInPath('GeneratorInterface/LHEInterface/data/run_generic_tarball_cvmfs.sh')
)
import FWCore.ParameterSet.Config as cms
from Configuration.Generator.Pythia8CommonSettings_cfi import *
from Configuration.Generator.MCTunes2017.PythiaCP5Settings_cfi import *
from Configuration.Generator.Pythia8PowhegEmissionVetoSettings_cfi import *
from Configuration.Generator.PSweightsPythia.PythiaPSweightsSettings_cfi import *

generator = cms.EDFilter("Pythia8ConcurrentHadronizerFilter",
                         maxEventsToPrint = cms.untracked.int32(1),
                         pythiaPylistVerbosity = cms.untracked.int32(1),
                         
                         pythiaHepMCVerbosity = cms.untracked.bool(False),
                         comEnergy = cms.double(13000.),
                         PythiaParameters = cms.PSet(
        pythia8CommonSettingsBlock,
        pythia8CP5SettingsBlock,
        pythia8PowhegEmissionVetoSettingsBlock,
        pythia8PSweightsSettingsBlock,
        processParameters = cms.vstring(
            'POWHEG:nFinal = 1',   ## Number of final state particles
                                   ## (BEFORE THE DECAYS) in the LHE
                                   ## other than emitted extra parton
          ),
        parameterSets = cms.vstring('pythia8CommonSettings',
                                    'pythia8CP5Settings',
                                    'pythia8PowhegEmissionVetoSettings',
                                    'pythia8PSweightsSettings',
                                    'processParameters'
                                    )
        )
                         )

ProductionFilterSequence = cms.Sequence(generator)


# Link to generator fragment:
# genFragments/Hadronizer/13TeV/Hadronizer_TuneCP5_13TeV_powhegEmissionVeto_1p_LHE_pythia8_cff.py
configuration_files.title: Hadronizer parameters

configuration_files.script:
#!/bin/bash


# Dump actual test code to a EXO-RunIISummer20UL16SIM-01172_test.sh file that can be run in Singularity
cat <<'EndOfTestFile' > EXO-RunIISummer20UL16SIM-01172_test.sh
#!/bin/bash

export SCRAM_ARCH=slc7_amd64_gcc700

source /cvmfs/cms.cern.ch/cmsset_default.sh
if [ -r CMSSW_10_6_17_patch1/src ] ; then
  echo release CMSSW_10_6_17_patch1 already exists
else
  scram p CMSSW CMSSW_10_6_17_patch1
fi
cd CMSSW_10_6_17_patch1/src
eval `scram runtime -sh`

mv ../../Configuration .
scram b
cd ../..

# Maximum validation duration: 28800s
# Margin for validation duration: 30%
# Validation duration with margin: 28800 * (1 - 0.30) = 20160s
# Time per event for each sequence: 13.3371s
# Threads for each sequence: 4
# Time per event for single thread for each sequence: 4 * 13.3371s = 53.3484s
# Which adds up to 53.3484s per event
# Single core events that fit in validation duration: 20160s / 53.3484s = 377
# Produced events limit in McM is 10000
# According to 1.0000 efficiency, validation should run 10000 / 1.0000 = 10000 events to reach the limit of 10000
# Take the minimum of 377 and 10000, but more than 0 -> 377
# It is estimated that this validation will produce: 377 * 1.0000 = 377 events
EVENTS=377


# cmsDriver command
cmsDriver.py  --python_filename EXO-RunIISummer20UL16SIM-01172_1_cfg.py --eventcontent RAWSIM --customise Configuration/DataProcessing/Utils.addMonitoring --datatier GEN-SIM --fileout file:EXO-RunIISummer20UL16SIM-01172.root --conditions 106X_mcRun2_asymptotic_v13 --beamspot Realistic25ns13TeV2016Collision --step SIM --geometry DB:Extended --filein file:EXO-RunIISummer20UL16wmLHEGEN-01134.root --era Run2_2016 --runUnscheduled --no_exec --mc -n $EVENTS || exit $? ;

# Run generated config
REPORT_NAME=EXO-RunIISummer20UL16SIM-01172_report.xml
# Run the cmsRun
cmsRun -e -j $REPORT_NAME EXO-RunIISummer20UL16SIM-01172_1_cfg.py || exit $? ;

# Parse values from EXO-RunIISummer20UL16SIM-01172_report.xml report
processedEvents=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"NumberEvents\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
producedEvents=$(grep -Po "(?<=<TotalEvents>)(\d*)(?=</TotalEvents>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
threads=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"NumberOfThreads\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
peakValueRss=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"PeakValueRss\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
peakValueVsize=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"PeakValueVsize\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
totalSize=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"Timing-tstoragefile-write-totalMegabytes\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
totalSizeAlt=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"Timing-file-write-totalMegabytes\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
totalJobTime=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"TotalJobTime\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
totalJobCPU=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"TotalJobCPU\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
eventThroughput=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"EventThroughput\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
avgEventTime=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"AvgEventTime\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
if [ -z "$threads" ]; then
  echo "Could not find NumberOfThreads in report, defaulting to 1"
  threads=1
fi
if [ -z "$eventThroughput" ]; then
  eventThroughput=$(bc -l <<< "scale=4; 1 / ($avgEventTime / $threads)")
fi
if [ -z "$totalSize" ]; then
  totalSize=$totalSizeAlt
fi
if [ -z "$processedEvents" ]; then
  processedEvents=$EVENTS
fi
echo "Validation report of EXO-RunIISummer20UL16SIM-01172 sequence 1/1"
echo "Processed events: $processedEvents"
echo "Produced events: $producedEvents"
echo "Threads: $threads"
echo "Peak value RSS: $peakValueRss MB"
echo "Peak value Vsize: $peakValueVsize MB"
echo "Total size: $totalSize MB"
echo "Total job time: $totalJobTime s"
echo "Total CPU time: $totalJobCPU s"
echo "Event throughput: $eventThroughput"
echo "CPU efficiency: "$(bc -l <<< "scale=2; ($totalJobCPU * 100) / ($threads * $totalJobTime)")" %"
echo "Size per event: "$(bc -l <<< "scale=4; ($totalSize * 1024 / $producedEvents)")" kB"
echo "Time per event: "$(bc -l <<< "scale=4; (1 / $eventThroughput)")" s"
echo "Filter efficiency percent: "$(bc -l <<< "scale=8; ($producedEvents * 100) / $processedEvents")" %"
echo "Filter efficiency fraction: "$(bc -l <<< "scale=10; ($producedEvents) / $processedEvents")

# End of EXO-RunIISummer20UL16SIM-01172_test.sh file
EndOfTestFile

# Make file executable
chmod +x EXO-RunIISummer20UL16SIM-01172_test.sh

if [ -e "/cvmfs/unpacked.cern.ch/registry.hub.docker.com/cmssw/el7:amd64" ]; then
  CONTAINER_NAME="el7:amd64"
elif [ -e "/cvmfs/unpacked.cern.ch/registry.hub.docker.com/cmssw/el7:x86_64" ]; then
  CONTAINER_NAME="el7:x86_64"
else
  echo "Could not find amd64 or x86_64 for el7"
  exit 1
fi
# Run in singularity container
# Mount afs, eos, cvmfs
# Mount /etc/grid-security for xrootd
export SINGULARITY_CACHEDIR="/tmp/$(whoami)/singularity"
singularity run -B /afs -B /eos -B /cvmfs -B /etc/grid-security -B /etc/pki/ca-trust --home $PWD:$PWD /cvmfs/unpacked.cern.ch/registry.hub.docker.com/cmssw/$CONTAINER_NAME $(echo $(pwd)/EXO-RunIISummer20UL16SIM-01172_test.sh)

#!/bin/bash


# Dump actual test code to a EXO-RunIISummer20UL16DIGIPremix-01271_test.sh file that can be run in Singularity
cat <<'EndOfTestFile' > EXO-RunIISummer20UL16DIGIPremix-01271_test.sh
#!/bin/bash

export SCRAM_ARCH=slc7_amd64_gcc700

source /cvmfs/cms.cern.ch/cmsset_default.sh
if [ -r CMSSW_10_6_17_patch1/src ] ; then
  echo release CMSSW_10_6_17_patch1 already exists
else
  scram p CMSSW CMSSW_10_6_17_patch1
fi
cd CMSSW_10_6_17_patch1/src
eval `scram runtime -sh`

mv ../../Configuration .
scram b
cd ../..

# Maximum validation duration: 28800s
# Margin for validation duration: 30%
# Validation duration with margin: 28800 * (1 - 0.30) = 20160s
# Time per event for each sequence: 8.9919s
# Threads for each sequence: 4
# Time per event for single thread for each sequence: 4 * 8.9919s = 35.9676s
# Which adds up to 35.9676s per event
# Single core events that fit in validation duration: 20160s / 35.9676s = 560
# Produced events limit in McM is 10000
# According to 1.0000 efficiency, validation should run 10000 / 1.0000 = 10000 events to reach the limit of 10000
# Take the minimum of 560 and 10000, but more than 0 -> 560
# It is estimated that this validation will produce: 560 * 1.0000 = 560 events
EVENTS=560


# cmsDriver command
cmsDriver.py  --python_filename EXO-RunIISummer20UL16DIGIPremix-01271_1_cfg.py --eventcontent PREMIXRAW --customise Configuration/DataProcessing/Utils.addMonitoring --datatier GEN-SIM-DIGI --fileout file:EXO-RunIISummer20UL16DIGIPremix-01271.root --pileup_input "dbs:/Neutrino_E-10_gun/RunIISummer20ULPrePremix-UL16_106X_mcRun2_asymptotic_v13-v1/PREMIX" --conditions 106X_mcRun2_asymptotic_v13 --step DIGI,DATAMIX,L1,DIGI2RAW --procModifiers premix_stage2 --geometry DB:Extended --filein file:EXO-RunIISummer20UL16SIM-01172.root --datamix PreMix --era Run2_2016 --runUnscheduled --no_exec --mc -n $EVENTS || exit $? ;

# Run generated config
REPORT_NAME=EXO-RunIISummer20UL16DIGIPremix-01271_report.xml
# Run the cmsRun
cmsRun -e -j $REPORT_NAME EXO-RunIISummer20UL16DIGIPremix-01271_1_cfg.py || exit $? ;

# Parse values from EXO-RunIISummer20UL16DIGIPremix-01271_report.xml report
processedEvents=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"NumberEvents\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
producedEvents=$(grep -Po "(?<=<TotalEvents>)(\d*)(?=</TotalEvents>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
threads=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"NumberOfThreads\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
peakValueRss=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"PeakValueRss\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
peakValueVsize=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"PeakValueVsize\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
totalSize=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"Timing-tstoragefile-write-totalMegabytes\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
totalSizeAlt=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"Timing-file-write-totalMegabytes\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
totalJobTime=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"TotalJobTime\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
totalJobCPU=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"TotalJobCPU\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
eventThroughput=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"EventThroughput\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
avgEventTime=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"AvgEventTime\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
if [ -z "$threads" ]; then
  echo "Could not find NumberOfThreads in report, defaulting to 1"
  threads=1
fi
if [ -z "$eventThroughput" ]; then
  eventThroughput=$(bc -l <<< "scale=4; 1 / ($avgEventTime / $threads)")
fi
if [ -z "$totalSize" ]; then
  totalSize=$totalSizeAlt
fi
if [ -z "$processedEvents" ]; then
  processedEvents=$EVENTS
fi
echo "Validation report of EXO-RunIISummer20UL16DIGIPremix-01271 sequence 1/1"
echo "Processed events: $processedEvents"
echo "Produced events: $producedEvents"
echo "Threads: $threads"
echo "Peak value RSS: $peakValueRss MB"
echo "Peak value Vsize: $peakValueVsize MB"
echo "Total size: $totalSize MB"
echo "Total job time: $totalJobTime s"
echo "Total CPU time: $totalJobCPU s"
echo "Event throughput: $eventThroughput"
echo "CPU efficiency: "$(bc -l <<< "scale=2; ($totalJobCPU * 100) / ($threads * $totalJobTime)")" %"
echo "Size per event: "$(bc -l <<< "scale=4; ($totalSize * 1024 / $producedEvents)")" kB"
echo "Time per event: "$(bc -l <<< "scale=4; (1 / $eventThroughput)")" s"
echo "Filter efficiency percent: "$(bc -l <<< "scale=8; ($producedEvents * 100) / $processedEvents")" %"
echo "Filter efficiency fraction: "$(bc -l <<< "scale=10; ($producedEvents) / $processedEvents")

# End of EXO-RunIISummer20UL16DIGIPremix-01271_test.sh file
EndOfTestFile

# Make file executable
chmod +x EXO-RunIISummer20UL16DIGIPremix-01271_test.sh

if [ -e "/cvmfs/unpacked.cern.ch/registry.hub.docker.com/cmssw/el7:amd64" ]; then
  CONTAINER_NAME="el7:amd64"
elif [ -e "/cvmfs/unpacked.cern.ch/registry.hub.docker.com/cmssw/el7:x86_64" ]; then
  CONTAINER_NAME="el7:x86_64"
else
  echo "Could not find amd64 or x86_64 for el7"
  exit 1
fi
# Run in singularity container
# Mount afs, eos, cvmfs
# Mount /etc/grid-security for xrootd
export SINGULARITY_CACHEDIR="/tmp/$(whoami)/singularity"
singularity run -B /afs -B /eos -B /cvmfs -B /etc/grid-security -B /etc/pki/ca-trust --home $PWD:$PWD /cvmfs/unpacked.cern.ch/registry.hub.docker.com/cmssw/$CONTAINER_NAME $(echo $(pwd)/EXO-RunIISummer20UL16DIGIPremix-01271_test.sh)

configuration_files.script:
#!/bin/bash


# Dump actual test code to a EXO-RunIISummer20UL16HLT-01271_test.sh file that can be run in Singularity
cat <<'EndOfTestFile' > EXO-RunIISummer20UL16HLT-01271_test.sh
#!/bin/bash

export SCRAM_ARCH=slc7_amd64_gcc530

source /cvmfs/cms.cern.ch/cmsset_default.sh
if [ -r CMSSW_8_0_36_UL_patch1/src ] ; then
  echo release CMSSW_8_0_36_UL_patch1 already exists
else
  scram p CMSSW CMSSW_8_0_36_UL_patch1
fi
cd CMSSW_8_0_36_UL_patch1/src
eval `scram runtime -sh`

mv ../../Configuration .
scram b
cd ../..

# Maximum validation duration: 28800s
# Margin for validation duration: 30%
# Validation duration with margin: 28800 * (1 - 0.30) = 20160s
# Time per event for each sequence: 4.3639s
# Threads for each sequence: 4
# Time per event for single thread for each sequence: 4 * 4.3639s = 17.4556s
# Which adds up to 17.4556s per event
# Single core events that fit in validation duration: 20160s / 17.4556s = 1154
# Produced events limit in McM is 10000
# According to 1.0000 efficiency, validation should run 10000 / 1.0000 = 10000 events to reach the limit of 10000
# Take the minimum of 1154 and 10000, but more than 0 -> 1154
# It is estimated that this validation will produce: 1154 * 1.0000 = 1154 events
EVENTS=1154


# cmsDriver command
cmsDriver.py  --python_filename EXO-RunIISummer20UL16HLT-01271_1_cfg.py --eventcontent RAWSIM --outputCommand "keep *_mix_*_*,keep *_genPUProtons_*_*" --customise Configuration/DataProcessing/Utils.addMonitoring --datatier GEN-SIM-RAW --inputCommands "keep *","drop *_*_BMTF_*","drop *PixelFEDChannel*_*_*_*" --fileout file:EXO-RunIISummer20UL16HLT-01271.root --conditions 80X_mcRun2_asymptotic_2016_TrancheIV_v6 --customise_commands 'process.source.bypassVersionCheck = cms.untracked.bool(True)' --step HLT:25ns15e33_v4 --geometry DB:Extended --filein file:EXO-RunIISummer20UL16DIGIPremix-01271.root --era Run2_2016 --no_exec --mc -n $EVENTS || exit $? ;

# Run generated config
REPORT_NAME=EXO-RunIISummer20UL16HLT-01271_report.xml
# Run the cmsRun
cmsRun -e -j $REPORT_NAME EXO-RunIISummer20UL16HLT-01271_1_cfg.py || exit $? ;

# Parse values from EXO-RunIISummer20UL16HLT-01271_report.xml report
processedEvents=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"NumberEvents\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
producedEvents=$(grep -Po "(?<=<TotalEvents>)(\d*)(?=</TotalEvents>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
threads=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"NumberOfThreads\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
peakValueRss=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"PeakValueRss\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
peakValueVsize=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"PeakValueVsize\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
totalSize=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"Timing-tstoragefile-write-totalMegabytes\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
totalSizeAlt=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"Timing-file-write-totalMegabytes\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
totalJobTime=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"TotalJobTime\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
totalJobCPU=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"TotalJobCPU\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
eventThroughput=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"EventThroughput\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
avgEventTime=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"AvgEventTime\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
if [ -z "$threads" ]; then
  echo "Could not find NumberOfThreads in report, defaulting to 1"
  threads=1
fi
if [ -z "$eventThroughput" ]; then
  eventThroughput=$(bc -l <<< "scale=4; 1 / ($avgEventTime / $threads)")
fi
if [ -z "$totalSize" ]; then
  totalSize=$totalSizeAlt
fi
if [ -z "$processedEvents" ]; then
  processedEvents=$EVENTS
fi
echo "Validation report of EXO-RunIISummer20UL16HLT-01271 sequence 1/1"
echo "Processed events: $processedEvents"
echo "Produced events: $producedEvents"
echo "Threads: $threads"
echo "Peak value RSS: $peakValueRss MB"
echo "Peak value Vsize: $peakValueVsize MB"
echo "Total size: $totalSize MB"
echo "Total job time: $totalJobTime s"
echo "Total CPU time: $totalJobCPU s"
echo "Event throughput: $eventThroughput"
echo "CPU efficiency: "$(bc -l <<< "scale=2; ($totalJobCPU * 100) / ($threads * $totalJobTime)")" %"
echo "Size per event: "$(bc -l <<< "scale=4; ($totalSize * 1024 / $producedEvents)")" kB"
echo "Time per event: "$(bc -l <<< "scale=4; (1 / $eventThroughput)")" s"
echo "Filter efficiency percent: "$(bc -l <<< "scale=8; ($producedEvents * 100) / $processedEvents")" %"
echo "Filter efficiency fraction: "$(bc -l <<< "scale=10; ($producedEvents) / $processedEvents")

# End of EXO-RunIISummer20UL16HLT-01271_test.sh file
EndOfTestFile

# Make file executable
chmod +x EXO-RunIISummer20UL16HLT-01271_test.sh

if [ -e "/cvmfs/unpacked.cern.ch/registry.hub.docker.com/cmssw/el7:amd64" ]; then
  CONTAINER_NAME="el7:amd64"
elif [ -e "/cvmfs/unpacked.cern.ch/registry.hub.docker.com/cmssw/el7:x86_64" ]; then
  CONTAINER_NAME="el7:x86_64"
else
  echo "Could not find amd64 or x86_64 for el7"
  exit 1
fi
# Run in singularity container
# Mount afs, eos, cvmfs
# Mount /etc/grid-security for xrootd
export SINGULARITY_CACHEDIR="/tmp/$(whoami)/singularity"
singularity run -B /afs -B /eos -B /cvmfs -B /etc/grid-security -B /etc/pki/ca-trust --home $PWD:$PWD /cvmfs/unpacked.cern.ch/registry.hub.docker.com/cmssw/$CONTAINER_NAME $(echo $(pwd)/EXO-RunIISummer20UL16HLT-01271_test.sh)

#!/bin/bash


# Dump actual test code to a EXO-RunIISummer20UL16RECO-01271_test.sh file that can be run in Singularity
cat <<'EndOfTestFile' > EXO-RunIISummer20UL16RECO-01271_test.sh
#!/bin/bash

export SCRAM_ARCH=slc7_amd64_gcc700

source /cvmfs/cms.cern.ch/cmsset_default.sh
if [ -r CMSSW_10_6_17_patch1/src ] ; then
  echo release CMSSW_10_6_17_patch1 already exists
else
  scram p CMSSW CMSSW_10_6_17_patch1
fi
cd CMSSW_10_6_17_patch1/src
eval `scram runtime -sh`

mv ../../Configuration .
scram b
cd ../..

# Maximum validation duration: 28800s
# Margin for validation duration: 30%
# Validation duration with margin: 28800 * (1 - 0.30) = 20160s
# Time per event for each sequence: 2.7827s
# Threads for each sequence: 4
# Time per event for single thread for each sequence: 4 * 2.7827s = 11.1308s
# Which adds up to 11.1308s per event
# Single core events that fit in validation duration: 20160s / 11.1308s = 1811
# Produced events limit in McM is 10000
# According to 1.0000 efficiency, validation should run 10000 / 1.0000 = 10000 events to reach the limit of 10000
# Take the minimum of 1811 and 10000, but more than 0 -> 1811
# It is estimated that this validation will produce: 1811 * 1.0000 = 1811 events
EVENTS=1811


# cmsDriver command
cmsDriver.py  --python_filename EXO-RunIISummer20UL16RECO-01271_1_cfg.py --eventcontent AODSIM --customise Configuration/DataProcessing/Utils.addMonitoring --datatier AODSIM --fileout file:EXO-RunIISummer20UL16RECO-01271.root --conditions 106X_mcRun2_asymptotic_v13 --step RAW2DIGI,L1Reco,RECO,RECOSIM --geometry DB:Extended --filein file:EXO-RunIISummer20UL16HLT-01271.root --era Run2_2016 --runUnscheduled --no_exec --mc -n $EVENTS || exit $? ;

# Run generated config
REPORT_NAME=EXO-RunIISummer20UL16RECO-01271_report.xml
# Run the cmsRun
cmsRun -e -j $REPORT_NAME EXO-RunIISummer20UL16RECO-01271_1_cfg.py || exit $? ;

# Parse values from EXO-RunIISummer20UL16RECO-01271_report.xml report
processedEvents=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"NumberEvents\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
producedEvents=$(grep -Po "(?<=<TotalEvents>)(\d*)(?=</TotalEvents>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
threads=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"NumberOfThreads\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
peakValueRss=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"PeakValueRss\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
peakValueVsize=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"PeakValueVsize\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
totalSize=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"Timing-tstoragefile-write-totalMegabytes\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
totalSizeAlt=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"Timing-file-write-totalMegabytes\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
totalJobTime=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"TotalJobTime\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
totalJobCPU=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"TotalJobCPU\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
eventThroughput=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"EventThroughput\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
avgEventTime=$(grep -Po "(?<=<Metric Name=\"AvgEventTime\" Value=\")(.*)(?=\"/>)" $REPORT_NAME | tail -n 1)
if [ -z "$threads" ]; then
  echo "Could not find NumberOfThreads in report, defaulting to 1"
  threads=1
fi
if [ -z "$eventThroughput" ]; then
  eventThroughput=$(bc -l <<< "scale=4; 1 / ($avgEventTime / $threads)")
fi
if [ -z "$totalSize" ]; then
  totalSize=$totalSizeAlt
fi
if [ -z "$processedEvents" ]; then
  processedEvents=$EVENTS
fi
echo "Validation report of EXO-RunIISummer20UL16RECO-01271 sequence 1/1"
echo "Processed events: $processedEvents"
echo "Produced events: $producedEvents"
echo "Threads: $threads"
echo "Peak value RSS: $peakValueRss MB"
echo "Peak value Vsize: $peakValueVsize MB"
echo "Total size: $totalSize MB"
echo "Total job time: $totalJobTime s"
echo "Total CPU time: $totalJobCPU s"
echo "Event throughput: $eventThroughput"
echo "CPU efficiency: "$(bc -l <<< "scale=2; ($totalJobCPU * 100) / ($threads * $totalJobTime)")" %"
echo "Size per event: "$(bc -l <<< "scale=4; ($totalSize * 1024 / $producedEvents)")" kB"
echo "Time per event: "$(bc -l <<< "scale=4; (1 / $eventThroughput)")" s"
echo "Filter efficiency percent: "$(bc -l <<< "scale=8; ($producedEvents * 100) / $processedEvents")" %"
echo "Filter efficiency fraction: "$(bc -l <<< "scale=10; ($producedEvents) / $processedEvents")

# End of EXO-RunIISummer20UL16RECO-01271_test.sh file
EndOfTestFile

# Make file executable
chmod +x EXO-RunIISummer20UL16RECO-01271_test.sh

if [ -e "/cvmfs/unpacked.cern.ch/registry.hub.docker.com/cmssw/el7:amd64" ]; then
  CONTAINER_NAME="el7:amd64"
elif [ -e "/cvmfs/unpacked.cern.ch/registry.hub.docker.com/cmssw/el7:x86_64" ]; then

  echo "Could not find amd64 or x86_64 for el7"
  exit 1

# Run in singularity container

singularity run -B /afs -B /eos -B /cvmfs -B /etc/grid-security -B /etc/pki/ca-trust --home $PWD:$PWD /cvmfs/unpacked.cern.ch/registry.hub.docker.com/cmssw/$CONTAINER_NAME $(echo $(pwd)/EXO-RunIISummer20UL16RECO-01271_test.sh)

pileup.description: To make these simulated data comparable with the collision data, pile-up events are added to the simulated event in the DIGI2RAW step.

system_details.description: NANOAODSIM datasets are in the ROOT tree format and their analysis does not require the use of CMSSW or CMS open data environments. They can be analysed with common ROOT and Python tools.

title: /DYToMuMu_M-200To400_TuneCP5_13TeV-powheg-pythia8/RunIISummer20UL16NanoAODv9-106X_mcRun2_asymptotic_v17-v1/NANOAODSIM
title_additional: Simulated dataset DYToMuMu_M-200To400_TuneCP5_13TeV-powheg-pythia8 in NANOAODSIM format for 2016 collision data

usage.description: You can access these data through XRootD protocol or direct download, and they can be analysed with common ROOT and Python tools. See the instructions for getting started in

validation.description: The generation and simulation of Monte Carlo data has been validated through general CMS validation procedures.
